title: Gothic Church
description: A mod about a Gothic Church structure with villagers and hidden loot
body:
### Gothic Church

This mod adds a Gothic Church structure to the Forest, Dark Forest, and Plains biomes. Inside, you’ll discover hidden loot, numerous villagers, and secrets waiting to be explored.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aacaa844b53d94ec0379d35d4e86b927de15496.jpeg)

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/227fa91e29e8ac4e62f5ac90dd0eed952f8dc3ea.jpeg)

Outside the church, you’ll find detailed surroundings, including a small graveyard and a well.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f05c4980bf141355ab44da1e1d4a18df4e44855.jpeg)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d8a10e7f871c8ad8a331b129f0238bf933e2efb.jpeg)

There’s also a secret way to climb the church tower, where a small reward awaits those who make it to the top.


**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
